title: Golden Sun 2: TLA Mars Lightouse on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Golden Sun: The Lost Age is the best game I've ever played for a handheld system. Get it (though I also highly recommend it's prequel, Golden Sun, first).

For those of you who have played it (brief applause) this is the song that plays at the final lightouse in the series: Mars Lightouse.

Many of the Golden Sun songs are complicated. Many of them wouldn't be possible on Mario Paint. I'm glad this one is.

I had actually started this song very early in my Mario Paint Composer career, but I didn't get very far because it was somewhat difficult and I got bored. I recently re-did the whole thing which took me a good amount of time (several days; more than usual).

It came out pretty well, but some of the parts (specifically the game boys) are kinda akward. The note range restrictions and the 5-note limit held me back several times, but I won't point the instances out with the hopes that you all won't notice :).

Please comment and enjoy!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
